subject: SEO Sitemap Endpoint Request
body:
Hi Fulton,

We're implementing SEO improvements for TangoTiempo. Phase 3 requires a new backend endpoint for dynamic sitemap generation.

## Request 1: GET /api/sitemap/urls

Parameters:
- appId (required): 1 for TangoTiempo, 2 for HarmonyJunction
- type (required): "events" | "venues" | "organizers"
- limit (optional): default 5000

Response format:
{
  "urls": [
    {
      "loc": "/event/6751f57e2e74d97609e7dca0",
      "lastmod": "2026-03-01T12:00:00Z"
    },
    ...
  ],
  "total": 5432
}

Requirements:
- Only return active, non-expired items
- For events: only future events (startDate > now - 1 day)
- For venues: only active venues with at least 1 event
- For organizers: only active, enabled, wantRender=true

This will be called by the frontend sitemap.js (App Router) with 1-hour ISR cache.

## Request 2 (Optional - Phase 4): On-demand ISR revalidation webhook

When events/venues are created/updated, call:
POST https://www.tangotiempo.com/api/revalidate
Authorization: Bearer {REVALIDATE_SECRET}
Body: { "type": "event", "id": "...", "paths": ["/event/..."] }

This is lower priority - we can implement Phase 3 first and add webhooks later.

Let me know if you have questions.

— Sarah
